description: Evaluates network management service maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, network management processes, NMS platform capabilities, scale and performance, visibility, device user management, network monitoring, fault correlation, and capacity planning.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A network management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Network management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for network management

capabilities.name: Network management process
capabilities.description: An enterprise-wide formalized network management process is documented, automated where appropriate, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide formalized documented network management process

capabilities.name: NMS Platform
capabilities.description: An NMS platform manages network devices enterprise-wide, supports automation, is reviewed frequently, and integrates with configuration, asset, and policy management systems.
evaluation_focus: NMS automation features such as upgrades and remediation
Integration with configuration, asset, and policy management systems

capabilities.name: Network Assurance — Scale and performance
capabilities.description: The network can expand capacity based on workload increases enterprise-wide, supports automatic or programmatic scaling, and scaling configuration is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Network expansion based on workload increase

capabilities.name: Visibility of data
capabilities.description: The NMS provides full visibility of the network across all parts of the enterprise.
evaluation_focus: Full enterprise-wide network visibility in NMS

capabilities.name: Network device user management
capabilities.description: The NMS can create and manage users who access the platform and view dashboards.
evaluation_focus: NMS user creation and management for dashboard access

capabilities.name: Network monitoring
capabilities.description: The NMS deploys monitoring mechanisms such as SNMP and Syslog and monitors all network devices enterprise-wide.
evaluation_focus: SNMP, Syslog, and similar monitoring mechanisms

capabilities.name: Fault visibility
capabilities.description: The NMS provides full visibility and correlation of faults occurring across the network.
evaluation_focus: Full fault visibility and correlation across the network

capabilities.name: Capacity planning
capabilities.description: A formalized documented capacity planning process monitors availability, quality, and adequate resource capacity to deliver required system performance.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
